requirements.summary: Implement Internet Identity authentication with passkey-based login for protected features access
acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate using Internet Identity
Unauthenticated users cannot access manga reading features
Authentication state persists across page refreshes
Logout functionality clears authentication state

file_operations.description: Create authentication button component using the authorization component. This component handles login/logout flow with Internet Identity, displays current authentication state, and clears cached data on logout. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create user profile setup modal that appears for first-time users. Uses authorization component's getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile methods to check and store username/email. Implements proper loading state handling to prevent modal flash. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create custom hook using authorization component to fetch current user profile with proper actor dependency handling and loading states to prevent profile setup modal flash. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create custom hook using authorization component to save user profile data with mutation support. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Create responsive home page with manga grid, cover images, and Read Now navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Grid layout is responsive (adjusts columns based on screen size)
Cover images load properly
Read Now button navigates to correct manga details page
Long descriptions are truncated with ellipsis

file_operations.description: Create home page displaying manga grid with responsive layout. Fetches manga list from getMangaList backend method, displays cover images using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(), and includes Read Now buttons that navigate to manga details. Integrates search (REQ-12) and pagination (REQ-13) components. Uses placeholder cover image frontend/public/assets/generated/manga-cover-placeholder.dim_400x600.png for any missing covers.

Create manga card component displaying cover image (via ExternalBlob.getDirectURL()), title, truncated description with ellipsis, and Read Now button. Implements hover animations per theme requirements. Falls back to frontend/public/assets/generated/manga-cover-placeholder.dim_400x600.png if cover unavailable.
Create custom hook to fetch paginated manga list from getMangaList backend method with caching via React Query.

requirements.summary: Create manga details page with chapter list and reader navigation
acceptanceCriteria: All chapter information is displayed clearly
Chapters are listed in order by chapter number
Clicking a chapter opens the reader for that specific chapter
Page shows bookmark and reading history status

file_operations.description: Create manga details page displaying manga title, cover image via ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(), full description, and ordered chapter list. Includes bookmark toggle button and displays reading history status. Chapter list items navigate to reader page with manga ID and chapter number. Fetches data from getMangaById backend method. Requires authentication per REQ-17.
Create chapter list component displaying chapters ordered by chapter number with titles. Each item is clickable and navigates to the reader page with the corresponding chapter.
Create custom hook to fetch manga details by ID from getMangaById backend method with React Query caching.

requirements.summary: Create manga reader page with vertical scroll, chapter navigation, and progress tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Images load sequentially in vertical scroll
Reader is fully responsive on mobile and desktop
Navigation buttons allow moving to previous/next chapter
Current chapter information is clearly displayed
Reading progress is automatically recorded to history

file_operations.description: Create reader page with vertical scroll layout for chapter images using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(). Displays current chapter number and title, provides previous/next chapter navigation, includes back button to manga details, and automatically records reading progress via recordReadingHistory backend method. Requires authentication per REQ-17.
Create custom hook to record reading history via recordReadingHistory backend method with mutation support.

requirements.summary: Implement dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence and #0f0f0f default
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle button is accessible from all pages
Theme preference persists across sessions
Dark mode uses #0f0f0f background
All text remains readable in both modes

file_operations.description: Create theme toggle button component that switches between light and dark modes, persisting preference in localStorage. Accessible from all pages via layout component.
Create custom hook managing theme state with localStorage persistence. Sets dark mode as default with #0f0f0f background and applies theme class to document root.

Add dark mode CSS variables and styles with #0f0f0f background for dark mode, purple/red accent colors, and ensure text readability in both modes. Define theme-specific color variables for consistent styling.
Configure Tailwind for dark mode with class strategy and define custom colors for dark background (#0f0f0f) and purple/red accents.

requirements.summary: Create admin panel with forms for manga and chapter management
acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is only accessible to users with admin role
Forms validate required fields before submission
Successfully added manga/chapters appear immediately in the library
Non-admin users are redirected if they attempt to access admin routes

file_operations.description: Create admin panel page with forms to add manga (title, description, cover image URL via ExternalBlob.fromURL) and add chapters (select manga, chapter number, title, image URLs via ExternalBlob.fromURL). Calls addManga and addChapter backend methods. Uses authorization component to verify admin role and displays AccessDeniedScreen for non-admin users. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create form component for adding new manga with fields for title, description, and cover image URL. Validates required fields and calls addManga backend method via custom hook. Uses blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.fromURL for image handling. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create form component for adding chapters to existing manga. Includes manga selector, chapter number, title, and image URLs array input. Validates required fields and calls addChapter backend method via custom hook. Uses blob-storage component's ExternalBlob.fromURL for image handling. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create access denied component shown to non-admin users attempting to access admin routes. Uses authorization component to check user role. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create custom hook to add manga via addManga backend method with mutation support and cache invalidation.
Create custom hook to add chapter via addChapter backend method with mutation support and cache invalidation.
Create custom hook to check if current user is admin via isCallerAdmin backend method. Uses authorization component. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement real-time search filtering by title or description
acceptanceCriteria: Search input is prominently placed on home page
Results update as user types (debounced)
Search matches both title and description text
Clear search button resets to show all manga

file_operations.description: Create search input component with debounced input handling. Calls searchManga backend method and updates displayed manga list in real-time. Includes clear button to reset search.
Create custom hook to search manga via searchManga backend method with debouncing and React Query caching.

requirements.summary: Implement pagination controls with configurable page size and URL state
acceptanceCriteria: Pagination controls are intuitive and accessible
Page state is reflected in URL query parameters
Users can navigate between pages smoothly
Page size is configurable

file_operations.description: Create pagination component with page numbers, previous/next buttons, and current page indicator. Default page size is 12. Updates URL query parameters for page state. Integrates with getMangaList backend method pagination.
Create custom hook managing pagination state with URL query parameter synchronization and configurable page size.

requirements.summary: Add bookmark functionality with toggle button and bookmarks page
acceptanceCriteria: Bookmark button shows current bookmark state
Clicking bookmark button adds/removes bookmark
Bookmarks page displays all bookmarked manga
Bookmark state persists across sessions

file_operations.description: Create bookmark toggle button component displaying current bookmark state and calling addBookmark/removeBookmark backend methods. Uses frontend/public/assets/generated/bookmark-icon.dim_64x64.png for icon. Requires authentication.
Create bookmarks page displaying all bookmarked manga from getBookmarks backend method in grid layout. Reuses MangaCard component. Requires authentication per REQ-17.
Create custom hook to fetch bookmarked manga via getBookmarks backend method with React Query caching.
Create custom hook to add bookmark via addBookmark backend method with mutation support and cache invalidation.
Create custom hook to remove bookmark via removeBookmark backend method with mutation support and cache invalidation.

requirements.summary: Create reading history page with continue reading links
acceptanceCriteria: History page shows manga title, cover, and last read chapter
List is sorted by most recently read
Continue reading button navigates to last accessed chapter
History updates automatically when user reads chapters

file_operations.description: Create reading history page displaying manga with last read chapter from getReadingHistory backend method. Sorted by most recent, with continue reading buttons navigating to last accessed chapter. Uses frontend/public/assets/generated/history-icon.dim_64x64.png for page icon. Requires authentication per REQ-17.
Create history card component displaying manga cover via ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(), title, last read chapter number, and continue reading button navigating to reader page.
Create custom hook to fetch reading history via getReadingHistory backend method with React Query caching.

requirements.summary: Apply modern anime-inspired theme with dark background, accents, animations, and mobile responsiveness
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses #0f0f0f background with purple or red accents
Hover effects and transitions are smooth and subtle
All pages are fully responsive on mobile devices
Typography and spacing follow modern design principles

file_operations.description: Create layout component wrapping all pages with navigation header, theme toggle, login button, and consistent spacing. Applies anime-inspired design with dark background and accent colors. Includes navigation links to home, bookmarks, history, and admin (if admin user).
Extend with anime-inspired theme styles including smooth hover transitions, purple/red accent colors, modern typography (consider anime-friendly fonts), and mobile-responsive spacing utilities.

requirements.summary: Implement protected routes with authentication redirects
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access protected pages
Users are redirected to appropriate login flow
After authentication, users are redirected to originally requested page
Admin routes additionally check for admin role

file_operations.description: Create protected route wrapper component that checks authentication state and redirects unauthenticated users. Uses authorization component to verify user authentication. Stores originally requested page for post-login redirect. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Create admin route wrapper component that checks both authentication and admin role, redirecting non-admin users to access denied screen. Uses authorization component's isCallerAdmin method. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire all pages into router with appropriate route protection. Wrap reader, manga details, bookmarks, and history routes with ProtectedRoute component. Wrap admin route with AdminRoute component. Configure routes for home page (/), manga details (/manga/:id), reader (/manga/:id/chapter/:chapterNumber), bookmarks (/bookmarks), history (/history), and admin panel (/admin). Include Layout component wrapping all routes.
